name: nvelope
description: Simple, secure document sharing on nostr — live folders, real revocation, one-key recovery. Built on NIP-DA Scoped Data Grants.

scripts.sync-connect: { echo "// vendored from JAFairweather/luke @ $(git -C ../luke rev-parse --short HEAD) — do not edit; npm run sync-connect"; cat ../luke/nave-connect.mjs; } > lib/nave-connect.mjs
scripts.sync-titlebar: { echo "// vendored from JAFairweather/nave.pub @ $(git -C ../nave.pub rev-parse --short HEAD) — do not edit; npm run sync-titlebar"; cat ../nave.pub/components/nave-titlebar.mjs; } > lib/nave-titlebar.mjs
